resultList.dtldesc: Property DetailsThis newly constructed 3 BHK flat is available for sale in Godrej Woodscapes, Budigere Cross, Bangalore. Developed by Godrej Properties, the apartment offers a modern lifestyle within a premium residential community designed with contemporary architecture and high quality infrastructure. Spread across a carpet area of 868 sq ft, the property is situated on the 23rd floor of a 38 floor tower, offering excellent views, natural light, and ventilation. The apartment is ideal for families and professionals looking for a well connected and upscale living environment in East Bangalore.Property SpecificationsThe apartment features 3 spacious bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 1 balcony with a smart and efficient floor plan that maximizes usable space. The flat is north west facing and overlooks the main road, providing good airflow and open surroundings. The property comes unfurnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to design and furnish the interiors according to their personal preferences and lifestyle needs. Premium vitrified flooring enhances the elegance and durability of the home. The property is available as a new property with power of attorney ownership and is suitable for immediate possession and future investment.FacilityResidents of Godrej Woodscapes enjoy access to a range of modern lifestyle amenities designed for comfort, fitness, and recreation. The project includes visitor parking facilities, jogging and strolling tracks, and outdoor tennis courts for sports and leisure activities. The gated community is planned to provide a secure and family friendly atmosphere with landscaped surroundings and well maintained common areas. The property is available at a price of 2.25 crore and home loan assistance is also offered for eligible buyers, making the purchase process more convenient and accessible.LocalityLocated at Budigere Cross in East Bangalore, the project enjoys excellent connectivity to major IT parks, business hubs, educational institutions, healthcare centers, and entertainment zones. The property is situated in Bidarahalli Hobli near Kadugodi, an area that is rapidly developing with strong infrastructure growth and improved road connectivity. Residents benefit from smooth access to Whitefield, KR Puram, Outer Ring Road, and other important parts of Bangalore. The locality offers a balanced lifestyle with peaceful surroundings, upcoming commercial developments, and easy access to daily essentials, making it an ideal residential destination for both end users and investors.
